offer: For fleet compliance officers managing 5–15 vehicles, manual tracking of vehicle inspections causes compliance risks. We automate monthly vehicle inspection compliance reports instead of spreadsheets and manual reporting processes.
problem: Manual tracking of vehicle inspections leads to compliance risks.
